name: Silver City Recreation Center
description: Silver City Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Silver City, NM. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Silver City Tennis Courts
description: Silver City Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Silver City, NM. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.

name: Silver High School
description: Silver High School is a place to play pickleball in Silver City, NM. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Western New Mexico University Intramural Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Western New Mexico University Intramural Gym in Silver City, NM! There are 8 courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
